name: Szechuan Chicken with Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine sherry; egg whites, sugar, and 2 tablespoons cornstarch. Mix ingredients well.
2. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and add to the egg white mixture. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, combine water, 1 tablespoon cornstarch, soy sauce, crushed red pepper, garlic, and ginger.
4. Preheat wok or large saute skillet on high heat. Add 3 tablespoons oil.
5. Cook for 30 seconds, then add the chicken mixture. Cooking times vary according to appliance used. Cook on high heat until done, stirring occasionally.
6. Reduce heat, add half a cup of peanuts (pulverize in a blender or food processor first for extra peanutty flavor).
7. Add snow peas and soy sauce mixture; cover and simmer until snow peas are cooked to your taste.
This dish is best served with plain white rice and is even tastier as a leftover. It also microwaves well. ENJOY!
